records.description: Python cannot import module — add cwd and src to PYTHONPATH

records.stderr_pattern: ImportError: lib[a-zA-Z0-9_.]+\.so[^:]*: cannot open shared object file
records.description: C extension cannot find shared library — add system lib dirs to LD_LIBRARY_PATH
Cannot import name from package — likely version mismatch or stale install

records.stderr_pattern: ERROR: No matching distribution found for
records.description: pip cannot find package — ensure pip index URL is set to default PyPI
Package directory missing __init__.py or not on path — extend PYTHONPATH
Python syntax error — likely Python version mismatch; disable bytecode cache
Indentation error — possibly stale .pyc from prior code version

records.stderr_pattern: TabError: inconsistent use of tabs and spaces
records.description: Mixed tabs and spaces — disable bytecode cache to prevent stale .pyc masking the fix
Write permission denied — rewrite cwd to writable directory
pip install permission denied on system site-packages — use --user install
File not found — cwd may be wrong; rewrite to project root

records.stderr_pattern: can't open file '([^']+)': \[Errno 2\] No such file or directory
records.description: Python script path not found — ensure cwd is the project root
Unicode decode error — force UTF-8 IO encoding and locale
Unicode encode error writing output — force UTF-8 encoding
File contains non-UTF-8 bytes — set locale to C.UTF-8
Python ran out of memory — limit malloc arenas to reduce fragmentation
Recursion limit exceeded — increase PYTHONRECURSIONLIMIT

records.stderr_pattern: requires a different Python version.*not in '>=
records.description: Package requires a newer Python version — report constraint to user
pip dependency resolution conflict — report conflict details to user

records.stderr_pattern: ConnectionRefusedError: \[Errno 111\]|Failed to establish a new connection.*Connection refused
records.description: Connection refused — retry with backoff
SSL certificate verification failed — may need to set CA bundle path

records.stderr_pattern: fatal error: Python\.h: No such file or directory
records.description: Missing Python.h header — python3-dev package likely not installed

records.stderr_pattern: error: command '(gcc|g\+\+|cc|c\+\+)' failed|error: linker `cc` not found
records.description: C/C++ compiler not found or failed — ensure CC/CXX env vars point to installed compiler

records.stderr_pattern: Failed building wheel for|error: subprocess-exited-with-error.*Building wheel
records.description: Wheel build failed — likely missing system build dependencies
Subprocess timed out — increase timeout to allow longer execution

records.stderr_pattern: OSError: \[Errno 98\] Address already in use|Address already in use
records.description: Port already in use — set PORT=0 to auto-select a free port
Config file has missing section or parsing error
TOML config file has invalid syntax — check file for syntax errors
